title: Trigger / exit engine
acceptance_criteria: src/trading/trigger-engine.ts exports pure function evaluateTriggers(position: OpenPosition, currentStraddleValue: string, clock: Clock, config: TriggerConfig): ExitDecision | null
CRITICAL sign convention: position is SHORT straddle (we sold it and collected premium). Profit = straddle_value FALLS below entry. Loss = straddle_value RISES above entry.
OpenPosition type: { id: string, entryStraddleValue: string, lowestStraddleValueSeen: string, entryTimeMs: number, todayNetPnl: string }

TriggerConfig type: { hardSlPct: number (from HARD_SL_PCT env, default 0.3 meaning 30%), trailingSlPct: number (from TRAILING_SL_PCT env, default 0.15), profitTargetPct: number (from PROFIT_TARGET_PCT env, default 0.3), eodExitTime: string (from EOD_EXIT_TIME env, default '15:25'), exitCutoffTime: string (from EXIT_CUTOFF_TIME env, default '15:30'), maxDailyLoss: string (from MAX_DAILY_LOSS env, default '10000') }
ExitDecision type: { shouldExit: true, reason: 'SL' | 'TSL' | 'TARGET' | 'EOD' | 'DAILY_LOSS' | 'EXIT_WINDOW' } | { shouldExit: false }
Hard SL: shouldExit=true, reason='SL' when Decimal(currentStraddleValue) >= Decimal(entryStraddleValue).mul(1 + hardSlPct)

Trailing SL: shouldExit=true, reason='TSL' when Decimal(currentStraddleValue) >= Decimal(lowestStraddleValueSeen).mul(1 + trailingSlPct) AND Decimal(currentStraddleValue) < Decimal(entryStraddleValue) (i.e., we are in profit territory but reversing)
Profit target: shouldExit=true, reason='TARGET' when Decimal(currentStraddleValue) <= Decimal(entryStraddleValue).mul(1 - profitTargetPct)
EOD square-off: shouldExit=true, reason='EOD' when clock.toISTTime(clock.now()) >= eodExitTime
Exit window: shouldExit=true, reason='EXIT_WINDOW' when clock.toISTTime(clock.now()) >= exitCutoffTime
Daily loss cap: shouldExit=true, reason='DAILY_LOSS' when Decimal(todayNetPnl) <= Decimal('-1').mul(maxDailyLoss)
Priority order when multiple triggers fire simultaneously: SL > DAILY_LOSS > EOD > EXIT_WINDOW > TSL > TARGET
Function is PURE — no DB reads, no side effects, no async. Takes all state as parameters. Uses decimal.js for all numeric comparisons.
Exports updateTrailingStop(position: OpenPosition, currentStraddleValue: string): string — returns the new lowestStraddleValueSeen (minimum of current and previous); also pure.
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
